step1.businessDescription: Northwind Roasters is a single-location specialty coffee shop with a small wholesale line for local offices. The brand should feel confident and calm — not loud third-wave posturing.

step2.painPoints: Cup logo, bag label, and Instagram grid feel like three different brands. Wholesale buyers cannot spot Northwind on a colleague's desk.
step2.desiredOutcomes: Regulars recognize the bag and cup before they read the name. Office buyers reorder because the brand feels as consistent as the roast.

voiceSamples: We roast Tuesday and Thursday. If you are picking up for the office, text us by Monday noon.

step4.missionStatement: Serve coffee worth slowing down for, in a room that feels like it belongs on this block.

step5.originSummary: Opened after the founders could not find a consistent daily cup within walking distance.

step6.existingTypeface: Futura on menus, Arial on receipts
step6.visualNotes: Dark navy and brass tones; avoid bright red accents.

step7.differentiation: Same roasting team on bar and on wholesale — no white-label mystery beans.
